body.title: [sprint] Consequence check: concept layer + tag architecture
body.description:
**What changed:** Added palace.concepts.* layer as peer to goals, /concept skill for collaborative authoring, and tag vocabulary as connective tissue replacing explicit cross-links.

**Predicted unintended effects:**
- Tag vocabulary fragments if different CC sessions coin slightly different tag names (C-graph-trees vs graph-trees vs graph_trees) — needs a canonical list consulted at authoring time
- /concept skill may be used to record things that should be decisions (scope drift toward using concepts as a decision log)
- File header # tags: lines may conflict with linting tools or import scanners that parse docstrings
- Gating T-concept-palace-seed on T-concept-skill may delay seeding too long — the confusion that prompted this work will keep recurring until concepts are written

**Signals to watch:** After concepts are seeded, observe whether any design conversation re-explains a concept that has a palace.concepts.* node. Also watch for tag naming drift across concept nodes.

**Gate condition:** Check by 2026-06-09.

**Affected files:** None — observation and verification only
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Observe predicted effects; annotate outcome as occurred / clear / partial and close
**Test plan:** no tests — this is an observation ticket
